item.title: Apple shares surge as profit beats estimates and guidance raised
item.description: AAPL rallies to a record high after strong quarterly growth and an upgrade from analysts.

item.title: Bitcoin plunges as recession fears trigger broad market selloff
item.description: BTC drops sharply amid panic selling; bearish sentiment and losses spread across crypto.

item.title: Federal Reserve holds rates steady, signals patience on cuts
item.description: The Fed kept policy unchanged, citing mixed data and an uncertain outlook for inflation.
